name: Sugar Cookies # 3
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter in a large mixing bowl.
2. Add sugar and beat until light and fluffy.
3. Beat in egg, lemon peel, and vanilla extract until well blended.
4. Gradually mix in flour and salt until well combined.
5. Beat in water, a few drops at a time, only until the dough starts to come away from the sides of the bowl.
6. Shape the dough into a large flat disk, wrap in plastic wrap, and refrigerate for 2-3 hours.
7. Preheat oven to 350°F.
8. Roll dough on a lightly floured surface to 1/8 inch thickness.
9. Cut with cookie cutters dipped in flour.
10. Bake for 10-12 minutes or until cookies begin to brown around the edges.
11. Carefully remove from baking sheets and cool completely on wire racks.
12. Decorate as desired, if cookies have not been painted.
